{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Temple of Rising Earth
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Temple of Rising Earth]] is a vassal team in the [[Uncrowned]] [[King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c9">''Uncrowned'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
